ab: ima qu mlikuy qasa?
hiya ga mama maku.
ima qu knerin qasa?
hiya ga qbsuyan maku knerin.
ima qu ’laqi qasa?
hiya ga sswe maku knerin.
yaya su ga cyux mtzyuwaw nanu?
ch: A:你的媽媽從事什麼工作?

ab: hiya ga hetay.
yaba su ga cyux mtzyuwaw nanu?
ch: A:你的爸爸從事什麼工作?

ab: hiya ga sinsiy.
hiya ga sswe su mlikuy ga?
iyat! hiya ga rangi sswe mu mlikuy.
ch: B:不是， 他是我弟弟的朋友。
en: No, he is my younger brother’s friend.

ab: hiya ga qbsuyan su knerin ga?
iyat! hiya ga sswe mu knerin.
ch: B:不是， 她是我的妹妹。
en: No, she is my younger sister.

ab: lhga ga pira kwara squliq cingasan nha?
en: How many people in their family?

ab: lha ga zmagan kwara squliq cingasan na.
en: There are five people in their family.

ab: pira laqi cyux ngasal simu?
en: How many children in your family?

ab: payat kwara llaqi myan.
en: There are four children in our family.

ab: pira cyux qu sswe su mlikuy ki knerin?
en: How many younger siblings do you have?

ab: ungat qu sswe mlikuy, cyux cyugan qu knerin hiya.
ch: B:我沒有弟弟，有三位妹妹。
en: I don’t have any younger brothers, but I have three younger sisters.

ab: pira cyux qu qbsuyan su mlikuy ki knerin?
en: How many older siblings do you have?

ab: ungat qu qbsuyan mlikuy ki knerin mu.
en: I don’t have any older siblings.

ab: pira kwara cyux mtswe su?
en: How many siblings do you have?

ab: ungat qu mtswe maku.
simu ga mtswe ga?
hiya ga qbsuyan mu mlikuy.
simu ga yuencumin ga?
aw! sami ga squliq na Tayal.
hiya ga squliq na Tayal ga?
aw! hiya ga squliq na Tayal.
